Off Calendar Jul-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christopher Epsha (415-250-8858) of Business Affair Consulant Inc. appearing via CourtCall, for Linna Xiu Ling Zhao, plaintiff and moving party / Aaron R. Marienthal (415-659-5925) of Reed Smith appearing via Court Call for Bank of America, defendant and opposing party

HEARING - Court's tentative ruling is to sustain defendant Bank of America's demurrer to second amended complaint with leave to amend as to the first through third counts to allege facts showing statute of limitations tolled or tolling or to allege Bank of America's liability for Credit Suisse Corp., to allege move regarding concealment, duty to disclose; sustain with leave to amend as to the fourth cause of action to allege unjust enrichment. MATTER ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument ADOPTS its tentative ruling as stated. Moving party to prepare order in conformity with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to first and second causes of action, which were not amended as ordered re first demurrer.
